description: Use this API to check whether the last corrective action solution attempt reached tolerance. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.3.0. ival = solved_ca()

ival.description: Exceeded iteration limit (Number of AC load flows).
Terminated because linear programming model cannot be setup.
Terminated because Linear Programming solution diverged.
Terminated because AC load flow exceeded iteration limit.
Terminated because AC load flow blown up (only when non-divergent option disabled).
Terminated because AC load flow terminated by non-divergent option.
Terminated because AC load flow terminated by console interrupt.
Terminated because AC load flow terminated by singular jacobian matrix (FNSL) or voltage= 0.0 (FDNS).
Terminated because AC load flow converged with stalled and/or tripped induction machines.
